name: slide-forge
description: Turn any document into a polished 1920×1080 presentation — video, PDF, or interactive HTML. 13 themes, 22 content variants, fully automatic.
author: heytea

scripts.demo:html-local: rm -rf demo_html_out && mkdir -p demo_html_out && cp examples/scenes_example.json demo_html_out/scenes.json && echo '{"command":"step2","scenes":"./demo_html_out/scenes.json","output_dir":"./demo_html_out"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step3","scenes":"./demo_html_out/scenes.json","design_params":"./demo_html_out/design_params.json","output_dir":"./demo_html_out"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step4","html_dir":"./demo_html_out","output_dir":"./demo_html_out/screenshots","design_params":"./demo_html_out/design_params.json"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step6","scenes":"./demo_html_out/scenes.json","screenshots_dir":"./demo_html_out/screenshots","html_dir":"./demo_html_out","output_dir":"./demo_html_out","format":["html"]}' | node executor.js
scripts.demo:tencent-html-local: rm -rf tencent_html_demo && mkdir -p tencent_html_demo && cp examples/tencent_intro_scenes_fixture.json tencent_html_demo/scenes.json && echo '{"command":"step2","scenes":"./tencent_html_demo/scenes.json","output_dir":"./tencent_html_demo","design_mode":"neon-cyber"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step3","scenes":"./tencent_html_demo/scenes.json","design_params":"./tencent_html_demo/design_params.json","output_dir":"./tencent_html_demo"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step4","html_dir":"./tencent_html_demo","output_dir":"./tencent_html_demo/screenshots","design_params":"./tencent_html_demo/design_params.json"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step6","scenes":"./tencent_html_demo/scenes.json","screenshots_dir":"./tencent_html_demo/screenshots","html_dir":"./tencent_html_demo","output_dir":"./tencent_html_demo","format":["html"]}' | node executor.js
scripts.test:tencent-html: rm -rf test_tencent_html && mkdir -p test_tencent_html && cp examples/tencent_intro_scenes_fixture.json test_tencent_html/scenes.json && echo '{"command":"step2","scenes":"./test_tencent_html/scenes.json","output_dir":"./test_tencent_html","design_mode":"neon-cyber"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step3","scenes":"./test_tencent_html/scenes.json","design_params":"./test_tencent_html/design_params.json","output_dir":"./test_tencent_html"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step4","html_dir":"./test_tencent_html","output_dir":"./test_tencent_html/screenshots","design_params":"./test_tencent_html/design_params.json"}' | node executor.js && echo '{"command":"step6","scenes":"./test_tencent_html/scenes.json","screenshots_dir":"./test_tencent_html/screenshots","html_dir":"./test_tencent_html","output_dir":"./test_tencent_html","format":["html"]}' | node executor.js
scripts.clean: rm -rf output test_e2e test_step0 test_step1 test_full test_output test_project test_themes debug_html preview preview_four_variants demo_html_out test_html_only test_preview_light_swiss tencent_html_demo test_tencent_html verify_notebook_shell
